title: Client Truth Boundary
purpose: Protect client truth from local redefinition or unsupported inference.
scope:
- In scope: verified client facts and evidence state.
- Out of scope: forecasts presented as facts.
responsibilities:
- Preserve provenance.
- Fail closed when authority or evidence is missing.
authority:
- Constitution: Article 0 and Article III.
- ADR authority: ADR-001 and ADR-003.
boundaries:
- Permitted: consume verified truth.
- Prohibited: invent or recalculate official truth.
dependencies:
- Upstream: evidence owners.
- Downstream: bounded consumers.
source_of_truth:
- Conceptual owner: established by active authority.
- Canonical source: verified evidence envelope.
related_documents:
- Governance Registry.
- Active Source of Truth index.
constitutional_references:
- Article 0 / Ley Zero.
- Articles II, III, V and IX.
traceability:
- Template: Canonical Architecture Boundary Scaffold.
- Gate: SG-002 exact allowlist required.
